business_ideas.idea: Stock option pooling platform: employees can diversify equity risk across tech company options instead of betting all on one startup
Incentive design SaaS for sales/business operations: optimize commissions, bonuses, clawbacks, loss aversion mechanics

predictions.text: Tech employees can become millionaires through stock options; pooling options reduces concentration risk
Figma will be one of first massive exits from WebGL technology inflection point
